name: Moonbeam
components: M (several seeds of any moonseed plant and a piece of opalescent feldspar)
description: A silvery beam of pale light shines down in a 5-foot-radius, 40-foot-high Cylinder centered on a point within range. Until the spell ends, Dim Light fills the Cylinder, and you can take a Magic action on later turns to move the Cylinder up to 60 feet. When a creature enters the Cylinder for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, it makes a Constitution saving throw, taking 2d10 Radiant damage on a failed save or half as much damage on a successful one. Using a Higher-Level Spell Slot. The damage increases by 1d10 for each spell slot level above 2.
